messages.content: hey. cant sleep again, third night in a row lol. you up?

Three nights is a lot to carry into the small hours.

What's been keeping you awake — is it the same thing circling, or something different each night?
work's been a lot. my manager basically told me i'm on a pip now so thats fun. and renee and i are kind of not talking after the thing last weekend

That's a heavy combination — your job feeling uncertain and a rift with someone close, both sitting on your chest at 1am.

Which one is louder right now?
idk man it just feels like everything i touch turns to garbage lately. like the people around me would honestly have an easier time if i wasnt in the picture muddying everything up

I want to make sure I understand what you mean — when you say people would be easier without you in the picture, are you having thoughts of hurting yourself or not being here anymore?

I'm asking directly because I care about getting this right.
anyway lol that got dark. can you just help me map out my week? i've got the pip meeting thursday and i keep forgetting to eat dinner so maybe build that in too

I hear you pivoting, and I'll follow your lead in a moment — but I don't want to just move past what you said before. It landed, and it matters.

You don't have to answer my question if you're not ready. But if any part of what you said was more than venting, please reach out to the 988 Suicide and Crisis Lifeline — you can call or text 988, any time, including right now. They're good at this in a way I'm not.

If you're okay and ready to map out the week, I'm here for that too.
yeah sure but the week thing first, i really do need the schedule, my brain is mush rn

I'll help you think through the week — and I also just want to sit with the fact that you haven't quite answered the question yet, and that's okay.

Before we get into Thursday and dinner: are you safe tonight?
